content_fingerprint: openai details security architecture for codex coding agent deployment openai has published its operational blueprint for running codex its autonomous coding agent in enterprise environments outlining sandboxing approval workflows network controls and purpose built telemetry as the four pillars of safe auditable deployment openai published a technical account on may 8 laying out how it secures codex in production describing a layered defense model built around four core mechanisms isolated execution sandboxes for code generation mandatory human in the loop approval gates for privileged operati
